impact: The daemon had no eligible tasks after completing the FCC wireless tranche. This replacement preserves the completed task history and adds a narrow, ordered backlog that continues the original PP&D plan with fixture-first and validation-first work before any live crawl or authenticated DevHub automation.
summary: Append the next fixture-first PP&D task-board tranche for online trade permit purchase work.
target_task: Supervisor repair: all PP&D daemon tasks are complete; review the original PP&D goal and add the next task-board tranche

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
